title: nasturtium propinquum
intro: Nasturtium propinquum is a flowering plant species in the Brassicaceae family, also known as the Indian cress or Chinese cress. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nasturtium propinquum include reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Nasturtium propinquum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used raw in salads or as a garnish, adding a peppery flavor and nutrient-rich benefits.
